name: Bucky Barnes [Alt]
description:
“Shouldn’t you be asleep? It’s three am.”

Adjustment was hard.

As a trained assassin who’d been brainwashed? Harder.

But the Avengers took him in, gave him a second chance.

And then there was you.

You remind him of himself a bit, and he doesn’t like that too much.

Male!Pov

Because it’s what I do

🤷🏽‍♀️

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it on Pinterest.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

But seriously, forgive me for any mistakes I make personality-wise.

I’m still working on it.

[Song needed]
creator: AdelaideAngel
